questions.q: Which major piece of Canadian legislation officially received Royal Assent today, bringing middle-class tax cuts and the removal of the federal fuel charge into law?
options: The Making Life More Affordable for Canadians Act (Bill C-4)

questions.q: Federal investigators are treating a violent attack on one of the United States' largest Reform synagogues in which city today as a targeted act of violence against the Jewish community?
The Canadian government introduced Bill C-22 today, which would grant new powers to law enforcement and which agency to investigate digital threats and organized crime?
Canada announced over $37.7 million in humanitarian funding today to provide food, water, and medical services to civilians in which conflict-affected country?
The Privacy Commissioner of Canada tabled a special report in Parliament today regarding an investigation into which controversial mobile application?
